title: Hybridization-capture for nanopore sequencing
author: Isac Lee
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zxyf7pw

steps.instruction: Split 40 ul eluate to 2 x 20 μL
Shear 3-5 μg DNA in 100 μL to ~2kb using the following settings on Diagenode bioruptor pico : 5 cycles, 4 sec on / 30 sec off
Split into two reactions to maximize the efficacy of the reactions.
Mix the following components in a sterile, nuclease-free tube: %s %s
Combine two reactions together in preparation for AMPure XP cleanup.
Incubate in thermocycler : 30 minutes at 20°C 30 minutes at 65°C hold at 4°C 01:00:00
Add 65 μL of AMPure beads (1X v/v ratio) at room temperature.
Incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature. 00:05:00 Undetermined
Spin down briefly on a minifuge and place on a magnetic rack until beads separate out of the solution.
Carefully remove the supernatant, making sure not to remove the beads.
Keeping the tube on the magnetic rack, add 200 μL of 70 % ethanol in nuclease free water, being careful not to disturb the bead pellet.
Incubate for at least 30 seconds at room temperature 00:00:30
Repeat the wash steps (steps 9-11) for a total of two washes, and remove the supernatant (step 9).
Spin down on a minifuge to pellet the residual ethanol, place on the magnetic rack, and remove the residual ethanol using a P10 pipet.
Resuspend in 27 μL of nuclease-free water (25 + 2 to account for transfer loss.)
Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature 00:10:00 Undetermined
Spin down briefly on a minifuge and place on a magnetic rack until beads separate out of the solution.
Retain the supernatant, which now contains the eluted DNA.
Add all reagents together as follows: %s %s
Carefully mix the reagents by pipetting up and down.
Briefly spin down in a microfuge.
Incubate in thermocycler, 20C for 15 minutes, then hold at 4C. 00:15:00 Undetermined
You can pause at this step and store the library at -20C
Purify the adapted DNA with 1.8X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute in 32 μL nuclease-free water. Refer to Ampure XP Cleanup step.
Use 0.75% cassette high-pass for size selection protocol. (estimated time 45 minutes) 00:45:00
Let it sit ~45 min after elution for best recovery. 00:45:00
Add all reagents together as follows for two reactions: %s %s
Carefully mix the reagents by inverting a few times.
Briefly spin the reagents down on a minifuge.
Amplify using the following cycling conditions: 03:00:00 %s %s
Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute in 15 μL nuclease-free water. Refer to Ampure XP Cleanup step.
Mix together these reagents to make Hyb buffer, volumes given are for one reaction: %s %s
Make SureSelect Block Mix. %s %s
Prepare RNAse block solution by diluting the RNAse block 1:10 with nuclease free water. (7 μL needed per reaction)
In a strip tube, add 3.4 μL gDNA to 5.6 ul SureSelect block mix
Mix by pipetting, and denature the DNA on a thermocycler by incubating at 95C for 5 minutes, followed by incubationg at 65C for at least 5 minutes 00:10:00
Meanwhile, make the capture library mix : %s %s
Keep at room temperature briefly, and add to the denatured DNA while the DNA is still on the thermocycler
Incubate for 16 or 24 hours at 65C with heated lid at 105C. 16:00:00 Undetermined
Prewarm SureSelectXT Wash buffer #2 at 65C.
Vigorously resuspend MyOne Streptavidin T1 beads on a vortex mixer.
Add 50 μL beads (per rxn) to a 1.5 mL tube.
Add 200 μL of SureSelect Binding buffer.
Mix the beads on a vortex mixer for 5 seconds.
Put the tubes into a magnetic rack
Remove and discard the supernatant.
Repeat above for a total of 3 washes.
Resuspend the beads in 200 μL of SureSelectXT Binding buffer

Take out hybridization mixture from thermal cycler, add directly to bead solution, invert 3-5X to mix. *If less than 20 μL hyb mixture remains after incubation, be wary of suboptimal capture performance.

Incubate hybrid-bait/bead solution on tube rotator at 10 rpm top-to-bottom for 30 minutes at room temperature. If sample is not properly mixing, mix with heat using a thermomixer at 30 C 800 rpm. 00:30:00 Undetermined
Briefly spin down on a minifuge.
Place on magnetic rack, remove and discard supernatant.
Resuspend in 500 μL wash buffer I by vortexing for 5 seconds
Incubate for 15 minutes at room temperature, occasionally mixing. 00:15:00 Undetermined
Spin down briefly on a minifuge, place on magnetic rack, and remove supernatant.
Resuspend beads in 200 μL 65C prewarmed wash buffer, mix on a vortex mixer for 5 seconds to resuspend beads.
Incubate 10 minutes at 65C 00:10:00 Undetermined
Briefly spin down on a minifuge, place on magnetic rack, and discard supernatant. Repeat the wash steps for a total of 3 washes.
Remove all wash buffer
Add 30 μL nuclease free water to each sample, pipet to resuspend. Keep samples on ice until next use.
Assemble PCR reaction, 2 for each capture reaction : %s %s
Amplify using the following cycling conditions: 02:30:00 %s %s
Perform NEBNext Ultra II End-Repiar/dA-tailing in 60 μL.
Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute in 30 μL nuclease-free water. Refer to Ampure XP Cleanup step.
Purify the DNA with 1X Ampure XP (v/v), and elute n 30 μL nuclease-free water.
Ligate on adaptors using NEB Blunt/TA Ligase Master Mix.
Purify the adptor-ligated DNA following the protocol's specifications.
Load on ONT MinION following the protocol's specifications and sequence for up to 48 hours.
